content_type=API文档
main_content:
TilingData结构定义 功能说明 定义一个TilingData的类，添加所需的成员变量（TilingData字段），用于保存所需TilingData参数。完成该TilingData类的定义后，该类通过继承TilingDef类（用来存放、处理用户自定义Tiling结构体成员变量的基类）提供以下接口： set_{field_name}接口：用于设置TilingData类的字段值，field_name为定义TilingData类时添加的字段名。 get_{field_name}接口：用于获取字段名为field_...

tool_choice.reasoning_content: We need to gather evidence to fix the previous error: `tiling.set_blockDim(1)` fails because `VanillaRnnHiddenCustomTilingData` has no member `set_blockDim`. The TilingData macro only generates setters for fields defined via `TILING_DATA_FIELD_DEF`. In the previous attempt, `blockDim` was not defined as a field. The solution is either to define `blockDim` in the TilingData struct, or not use `set_blockDim` at all. Let's fetch the TilingData API doc to confirm the macro behavior.

[ascend_fetch] title=WelfordFinalize Tiling-归一化操作-高阶API-SIMD API-Ascend C API-API参考-CANN社区版9.0.0开发文档
url=https://www.hiascend.com/document/detail/zh/CANNCommunityEdition/900/API/ascendcopapi/atlasascendc_api_07_0815.html
content_type=API文档
main_content:
WelfordFinalize Tiling 功能说明 Ascend C 提供WelfordFinalize Tiling API，方便用户获取WelfordFinalize kernel计算时所需的Tiling参数。 获取Tiling参数主要步骤如下： 具体为，通过 GetWelfordFinalizeMaxMinTmpSize 获取WelfordFinalize接口计算所需最大和最小临时空间大小。 kernel侧WelfordFinalize接口的计算需要开发者预留/申请临时空间， ...

The fix is to add `TILING_DATA_FIELD_DEF(uint32_t, blockDim);` to the tiling data struct and ensure `set_blockDim` matches the field name. Also, ensure the host tiling code sets `context->SetBlockDim(tiling.blockDim)` properly.
